title: Metrics Side Panel Visual De-Clutter and UX Polish
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want a visually cleaner metrics side panel with better-positioned controls, so that the interface feels less crowded and actions are easy to find.
description:
UX polish pass on the metrics side panel based on designer feedback:

1. Fix card padding to reduce visual crowding
2. Move the refresh success popup from upper-right to lower-right to stay out of the way; rename title to 'Refreshed Object'
3. Move the dashboards refresh button into the Not Related section with 14px font size
4. Right-align the 'Add Custom Link' button in the Related section for better action flow
acceptance_criteria: Card padding adjusted to reduce visual crowding
Refresh popup appears in lower-right with title 'Refreshed Object'
Dashboard refresh button moved into the Not Related section at 14px font
Add Custom Link button right-aligned in the Related section
ux_changes: Padding adjustments, repositioned refresh popup, relocated refresh button, and right-aligned custom link button.
implementation_notes: Pure CSS and layout changes. Applied to reports section as well for consistency.
comment_summary: Developer implemented all four layout adjustments and applied to both reports and dashboards sections. Pushed to staging.
